title: Utano Princesama Maji LOVE STARISH TOURS: The Journey Begins
titleRomaji: Uta no☆Prince-sama♪ Maji LOVE ST☆RISH Tours: Tabi no Hajimari
titleEnglish: Utano Princesama Maji LOVE STARISH TOURS: The Journey Begins
titleNative: うたの☆プリンスさまっ♪ マジLOVEスターリッシュツアーズ ～旅の始まり～
synopsis: TV anime special commemorating the series' 10th anniversary and the Uta no☆Prince-sama♪ Maji Love ST☆RISH Tours film. The boys of ST☆RISH have put in a lot of hard work for all their dedicated fans throughout the world. They deserve a reward before embarking on their next grand adventure! (Source: HIDIVE)

title: Monster Strike 2: MSonic! D'Artagnyan's Rise to Fame
titleRomaji: Monster Strike 2: Monster Sonic! D'Artagnan no Idol Sengen
titleEnglish: Monster Strike 2: MSonic! D'Artagnyan's Rise to Fame
titleNative: モンソニ！ ダルタニャンのアイドル宣言
synopsis: When D'Artagnan went to Tokyo for a little fun, she spotted an unforgetable sight: Lucifer singing while basking in moonlight in a park. From that moment, no matter if she was asleep or awake, D'Artagnan's heart would not stop throbbing for some reason. One day, D'Artagnan sees a concert by the popular idol act Angely Diva at her friend Izumo's invitation. There, she resolved to follow her idol dreams, and the story of song and miracles begins. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Kimi to Idol Precure♪ Omatase! Kimi ni Todokeru KirakkiLive!
titleRomaji: Kimi to Idol Precure♪ Omatase! Kimi ni Todokeru KirakkiLive!
titleNative: キミとアイドルプリキュア♪お待たせ！キミに届けるキラッキライブ！
synonyms: มหัศจรรย์ไอดอลพริตตี้เคียว เวทีประกายแสง คอนเสิร์ตนี้เพื่อเธอ
synopsis: One day, Uta and her friends find themselves invited to perform at the "Super Miracle Idol Festival," the universe's greatest idol festival held on the mysterious Aiai Island, by the coral fairy Tot. Suddenly, a mysterious monster appears, plunging the island and the world into a major crisis, and Uta and her friends are sent flying back in time. The key to overcoming this crisis lay hidden with the island's legendary goddess and with Tera, a mysterious idol-hating girl they meet on the island. Last but not least, the Hirogaru Sky! Precure and the Wonderful Precure also make their appearance! As they sing, dance and deliver fan-service, a kirakilala live for YOU begins! (Source: Official Website, translated)

StPri: Hajimari no Monogatari - Strawberry School Festival!!!
synopsis: Get ready to be swept away by the dazzling idol unit, Strawberry Prince! With over 8 billion YouTube views, millions of followers, and sold-out dome tours, these six stars—Rinu, Root, Colon, Satomi, Jel, and Nanamori—are unstoppable. From the NHK Red and White song battle to record-breaking tours, their rise is legendary. Discover the sweet beginnings of Japan’s most beloved idols. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Himitsu no AiPri: Ring-hen
titleRomaji: Himitsu no AiPri: Ring-hen
titleNative: ひみつのアイプリ リング編
synopsis: It's a new semester! Himari and Mitsuki have become second-year students of Paradise Private Academy! Their school lives become more and more lively with the introduction of new underclassmen full of individuality and personality. In the AiPri-Verse, new AiPri are appearing one after another! Everyone tries their hand at a brand new, never-before-seen Buzzrium Change! In the midst of all this, the mysterious Princess Ring Clover and her butler, Shimitsuu, are holding an Aipri contest. They say the winner will become an admired "Eternal Aipri." Himari and Mitsuki are all ready and full of fighting spirit! But it appears Princess Ring holds a very large secret... As their friends increase, so does the mysteries of the ring. The Ring arc finally begins! (Source: Offiical Website, translated)

title: Hurricane Live! 2033
titleRomaji: Hurricane Live! 2033
titleNative: バブルガムクライシス Hurricane Live! 2033
synopsis: Hurricane Live 2033: More Music of the Bubblegum Crisis spotlights the music that helped to make 80's series The Bubblegum Crisis the popular early piece of anime that its become. The hard rock songs of Priss and the Replicants are played amidst a video montage of the series' most exciting action sequences, and rarely seen live footage from the musicians themselves is also included. (Source: Tracie Cooper, All Movie Guide)
